allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\Telegram Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
